title: oxyacantha coccinioides
intro: Oxyacantha coccinioides, also known as Hawthorn, is a flowering plant belonging to the rose family that is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Hawthorn include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving circulation, and providing antioxidant properties. Hawthorn is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with herbal preparations often recommended to be taken in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
